title: Electromagnetic gripper
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Electromagnetic grippers''' were [[Droid/Legends|droid]] components that allowed the unit to attach to [[Starship/Legends|starship]] [[Hull/Legends|hulls]] while in [[Realspace/Legends|space]]. The grippers kept the droid securely attached, even when the vessel was moving at high speed. [[Astromech droid/Legends|Astromech droids]] commonly had electromagnetic grippers it their [[Tread|feet]].<ref name="RPG-Core">''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game Core Rulebook]]''</ref>
